description: File archive manager with game-mod archive support, primarily targeting the Fluffy mod manager layout. Handles format conversion, batch operations, and flattening/standardizing archives via pre-defined rules; ships a DLSite metadata plugin. Built in Rust with egui.
notes: Arclain shells out to '7z' and 'unrar' for most archive operations; both are installed as dependencies and shimmed onto your PATH.
Only tested on Windows by upstream.
